message:
🐛 Fix Mission Browser mobile layout (#2916)

- Hide filters by default on mobile (were consuming entire viewport)
- Default to list view on mobile (grid cards too small at 393px)
- Hide sidebar tree on mobile (280px sidebar left only 113px for content)
- Cap filter section height at 40vh on mobile with scroll
- Make tab bar horizontally scrollable on mobile

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
